---
title: "Frederick Warne"
---

## Frederick Warne

**Dates:** (1825-1901)

### Description

publisher

### Biography

He had offices at 15 Bedford Street, next door to Macmillan.

### Letters

- Letter from July 9th 1879
- Letter from Jany 5th [1878]
- Letter from Innocents day [28 December 1872]
- Letter from June 6th [1872?]
- Letter from May 19th [1871]
- Letter from March 5th [after 1870?]
- Letter from March 5th [1870?]
- Letter from Febry 10th [1870s?]
- Letter from Jan 8th [1870]
- Letter from Oct 26th 1868
- Letter from Oct 10th 1868
- Letter from Sept 23d [1868]
- Letter from Oct 12th 1867

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
